summary: Completed comprehensive testing of General Ledger Module. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed - page loads correctly, all UI elements present, account selector works, period filters work (Month/Quarter/FY/Custom), summary cards display correctly, ledger table shows all required columns with running balance, export generates CSV.
passed_tests: GET /api/finance/general-ledger returns 401 for unauthenticated users
GET /api/finance/general-ledger/accounts returns 401 for unauthenticated users
GET /api/finance/general-ledger/export returns 401 for unauthenticated users
GET /api/finance/general-ledger/accounts returns 200 for authenticated Founder
Accounts endpoint returns correct structure (accounts, categories arrays)
Each account has required fields (id, name, type, group)
Each category has required fields (id, name)
GET /api/finance/general-ledger requires account_id parameter (returns 422)
GET /api/finance/general-ledger returns 200 with valid account_id
Ledger response has correct structure (account_id, account_name, period, summary, entries)
Summary section has all required fields (opening_balance, total_debit, total_credit, closing_balance, net_movement)
Closing Balance formula correct: Opening + Credit - Debit
Each entry has required fields (date, reference, source_module, narration, debit, credit, running_balance)
Period filter 'month' works correctly
Period filter 'quarter' works correctly
Period filter 'fy' (Financial Year) works correctly
Period filter 'custom' with start_date/end_date works correctly
Invalid account_id returns 404
GET /api/finance/general-ledger/export returns 200
Export response has correct structure (account_id, account_name, period_label, rows)
Export rows include Opening Balance row first
Export rows include TOTALS/CLOSING row last
Export with period filter works
Running balance calculated correctly in order of date
Last entry running balance equals closing balance
General Ledger page loads at /finance/general-ledger
Sidebar shows 'General Ledger' tab under Finance menu
Page has data-testid='general-ledger-page'
Account selector (mandatory) with data-testid='account-select'
Account dropdown shows Bank & Cash Accounts section
Account dropdown shows Expense/Income Categories section
Period selector with data-testid='period-select'
Period options: This Month, This Quarter, Financial Year, Custom Range
Custom Range shows From Date and To Date inputs
Summary cards show: Opening Balance, Total Debit, Total Credit, Closing Balance
Ledger table has columns: Date, Reference, Source, Narration, Debit, Credit, Balance
Opening Balance row displayed first in table
TOTALS/CLOSING row displayed at bottom
Running balance calculated correctly in UI
Export button generates CSV download
Refresh button works
Footer shows closing balance formula
critical_code_review_comments: Backend API correctly implements all General Ledger endpoints with proper permission checks
Opening Balance calculation correct: Master opening + transactions before period
Running balance calculated in date order with transaction_id as secondary sort
Closing Balance formula verified: Opening + Credit - Debit
Both finance_accounts and accounting_accounts collections checked for compatibility
Categories also supported as ledger accounts
Export includes Opening Balance row and TOTALS/CLOSING row
Frontend has all required data-testid attributes for testing
Negative balances displayed in red for visual clarity
seed_data_creation: Used existing Petty Cash account with 165+ transactions for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: General Ledger module fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/finance/general-ledger (requires account_id), GET /api/finance/general-ledger/accounts, GET /api/finance/general-ledger/export. Frontend page at /finance/general-ledger with data-testid attributes: general-ledger-page, account-select, period-select, export-btn, summary-cards, start-date, end-date. Permissions: finance.general_ledger.view, finance.general_ledger.export. Petty Cash account has 233 transactions in FY 2025-2026 with Opening Balance ₹50,000, Total Debit ₹7,90,671, Total Credit ₹6,80,000, Closing Balance -₹60,671.

backend_api.GET /api/finance/general-ledger: WORKING - Returns ledger data with summary and entries
backend_api.GET /api/finance/general-ledger/accounts: WORKING - Returns accounts and categories list
backend_api.GET /api/finance/general-ledger/export: WORKING - Returns CSV-ready data with rows
backend_api.Period filters: WORKING - month, quarter, fy, custom all functional
backend_api.Running balance calculation: WORKING - Calculated correctly in date order

frontend_ui.sidebar_navigation: WORKING - General Ledger tab visible under Finance menu
frontend_ui.account_selector: WORKING - Shows accounts and categories with grouping
frontend_ui.custom_date_range: WORKING - From/To date inputs appear and work
frontend_ui.summary_cards: WORKING - Opening, Debit, Credit, Closing all displayed
frontend_ui.ledger_table: WORKING - All columns present with correct data
